---
title: "Rāg Bāhār"
subtitle: "*Phuli bana ghana*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Tāl:** Cautāl (Drut)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> phuli bana ghana more, āye basanta ri<br>aba bahata pavana manda manda samīraṇa mana bhāve,<br>jaba madhup  bṛnda nirata kara guṇjār<br>nayī nayī kaliyan para jāye, cuyā kaharata

**Antarā**

> ketakī gulāb aura campā bakula belā, <br>ati komal dala kusum sahita praphullita bhai<br>nāth nāth nirata karata nārī nirakha natha

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Cautāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, khālī **O** at beat 3, tali **2** at beat 5, khālī **O** at beat 7, tali **3** at beat 9, and tali **4** at beat 11.

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | S | m | - | m | m | m | m | m | P | D | P |
| **Phu** | **-** | **li** | **-** | **ba** | **na** | **gha** | **na** | **mo** | **-** | **-** | **re** |
| m | g | m | m | n | - | D | N | N | $\tr{S}$ | D | N |
| **ā** | **-** | **ye** | **ba** | **sa** | **-** | **-** | **nta** | **ri** | **-** | **a** | **ba** |
| N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | n | D | D | n | n | P |
| **ba** | **ha** | **ta** | **pa** | **va** | **na** | **ma** | **-** | **nda** | **ma** | **-** | **nda** |
| m | m | m | m | m | P | P | - | m | g | m | P |
| **sa** | **mī** | **ra** | **ṇ** | **ma** | **na** | **vā** | **-** | **be** | **-** | **ja** | **ba** |
| m | g | m | R | - | S | S | S | m | m | m | m |
| **ma** | **dhu** | **p** | **bṛ** | **-** | **nda** | **ni** | **ra** | **ta** | **ka** | **ra** | **gu** |
| m | P | m | g | m | m | n | - | D | - | $\lb{nD}$ | N |
| **ṇjā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **r** |
| N | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **na** | **yī** | **-** | **na** | **yī** | **-** | **ka** | **li** | **ya** | **n** | **pa** | **ra** |
| $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | n | D |
| **jā** | **-** | **ye** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| P | m | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - | - | - | m | m | R | R | S | S |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **cu** | **yā** | **ka** | **ha** | **ra** | **ta** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .cautal}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| n | D | D | n | D | N | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ |
| **ke** | **-** | **ta** | **kī** | **-** | **gu** | **lā** | **-** | **b** | **au** | **-** | **ra** |
| N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | n | D |
| **ca** | **-** | **mpā** | **-** | **ba** | **ku** | **-** | **la** | **be** | **-** | **lā** | **-** |
| D | n | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\lb{nD}$ | n |
| **a** | **ti** | **ko** | **-** | **ma** | **l** | **da** | **la** | **ku** | **su** | **m** | **sa** |
| P | m | m | m | - | n | D | D | N | $\lb{NN}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - |
| **hi** | **ta** | **pra** | **phu** | **-** | **lli** | **-** | **ta** | **bh** | **ai** | **-** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **nā** | **-** | **th** | **nā** | **-** | **th** | **ni** | **ra** | **ta** | **ka** | **ra** | **ta** |
| $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{g}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | n | D |
| **nā** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| P | m | $\lb{\sps{m}g}$ | - | - | - | m | m | R | R | - | S |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ni** | **ra** | **kha** | **na** | **-** | **tha** |

:::
